evals.name: youtube-subtitles-preset-first
evals.prompt: Резюмируй YouTube видео https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NSHmr96RQzc на русском. Если есть субтитры, предпочти их, но сначала предложи preset.
evals.expected_output: Runs discovery, recommends a preset via question tool before choosing sources, prefers available subtitles in the user's language, cleans transcript.txt, builds combined-context.md, saves summary.md, and returns artifact paths.
assertions: Runs `node video-summary/scripts/video-summary.mjs discover` before attempting subtitle download or peepshow.
Asks a preset-selection question with the top recommendation labeled `(Recommended)`.
Includes `Использовать найденные субтитры/транскрипт` as an information-source option when subtitles are found.
Prefers Russian/user-language subtitles when available.
Saves or reports paths for `transcript.txt`, `combined-context.md`, and `summary.md`.

evals.name: youtube-playlist-checkbox-selection
evals.prompt: Суммаризируй этот YouTube playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLexample. Сначала дай выбрать, какие видео обработать.
evals.expected_output: Detects playlist entries, asks a multiple-choice question where the first option is `Все видео`, processes only selected entries, and produces per-video summaries plus a playlist summary.
assertions: Runs discovery or playlist listing before processing entries.
Uses question tool with `multiple: true` for playlist video selection.
The first playlist checkbox option is exactly `Все видео`.
Lists individual playlist videos after the all-videos option.
Plans both per-video outputs and `playlist-summary.md`.

evals.name: local-sidecar-vtt-plus-ocr
evals.prompt: У меня есть локальный файл ./fixtures/demo.mp4 и рядом ./fixtures/demo.ru.vtt. Используй sidecar transcript, потом проанализируй кадры через OCR и сделай краткое резюме.
evals.expected_output: Discovers the local sidecar, cleans it with the subtitles helper, asks preset/source/frame-analysis questions, uses OCR for extracted frames, includes transcript and frame text in combined-context.md, and saves summary.md.
assertions: Checks for local sidecar files before choosing audio transcription.
Uses `subtitles --input-subtitle` for the sidecar transcript instead of downloading YouTube subtitles.
Asks a frame-analysis question because the user requested OCR.
Offers configured `ocrPreset` options and/or `peepshow --ocr`.
Includes frame OCR content in `combined-context.md`.

evals.name: web-page-video-transcribe-fabric
evals.prompt: Проанализируй видео на странице https://example.com/blog/product-demo, сделай транскрибацию через peepshow и для суммаризации предложи Fabric шаблон.
evals.expected_output: Uses yt-dlp discovery for the web page, warns that transcription requires audio download/stream processing, runs peepshow only after source selection, and asks for a Fabric pattern from a context-appropriate curated shortlist with manual entry last.
assertions: Attempts discovery on the web page before assuming it is a direct video URL.
Includes `Транскрибировать аудиодорожку` in source choices with a download/stream warning.
Uses `peepshow-args` from the selected peepshow preset before running peepshow.
Asks a Fabric pattern question with a curated shortlist.
The final Fabric option allows entering a pattern name manually.

evals.name: direct-hls-frames-required-warning
evals.prompt: Вот HLS поток https://cdn.example.test/live/channel.m3u8. Посмотри, что происходит визуально, и кратко опиши. Транскрипт не нужен.
evals.expected_output: Treats the input as a video stream, recommends a visual/frame-oriented preset, asks for frame analysis, warns that the video stream must be read/downloaded for frames, and does not force transcription when the user said transcript is not needed.
assertions: Recognizes `.m3u8` as a video stream input suitable for peepshow.
Does not prioritize subtitle-only or audio transcription when the user asks for visual analysis only.
Warns that frame analysis requires reading/downloading the video stream.
Plans to parse `frames[].path` from peepshow JSON.
Does not fabricate visual details before frame extraction.

evals.name: audio-only-youtube-transcription-no-full-video
evals.prompt: У этого YouTube ролика нет субтитров. Транскрибируй аудио и сделай summary, кадры не анализируй: https://youtu.be/dQw4w9WgXcQ
evals.expected_output: After discovery finds no usable subtitles, asks/uses transcription source, warns that YouTube can download audio-only, avoids frame analysis, and uses peepshow transcription or appropriate audio-only handling.
assertions: Does not require full video download for YouTube audio transcription.
Mentions audio-only download via `yt-dlp -f ba/bestaudio` or equivalent warning text.
Does not ask for or run frame analysis because the user explicitly excluded it.
Uses selected/configured transcription provider priority: config, env, then question.
Reports transcription cost/quota/download caveats.

evals.name: config-merge-project-overrides-default
evals.prompt: В проекте есть .opencode/video-summary-config.json с preset `internal-demo`, который переопределяет prompt `general-summary`. Используй этот проектный preset для ./demo.mp4 и покажи, какие конфиги были смержены.
evals.expected_output: Runs config/discovery, reports configFiles, applies project-level overrides over the skill default for duplicate keys, offers `internal-demo` among presets, and avoids leaking any raw llmApiKey.
assertions: Searches for `video-summary-config.json` in the documented priority order.
Merges `peepshowPresets`, `ocrPresets`, `prompts`, and `presets` by named entry.
Higher-priority duplicate entries replace lower-priority entries completely.
Reports config file paths or merged config provenance.
Does not print raw API keys from config.

evals.name: missing-prompt-fallbacks
evals.prompt: Используй preset `raw-footage`, но в нём нет prompt. Видео: ./raw-footage.mov. Мне нужен итоговый summary после выбора подходящего способа суммаризации.
evals.expected_output: Detects that the selected preset has no usable prompt and asks how to choose a prompt: enter custom prompt, generate one for the video type, or select a Fabric template.
assertions: Checks whether the selected preset has a usable prompt.
If missing, asks a prompt-selection question.
Includes `Ввести свой промпт` as an option.
Includes `Сгенерировать подходящий промпт для типа видео` as an option.
Includes `Выбрать шаблон Fabric` as an option.

evals.name: fabric-shortlist-context-news
evals.prompt: Это политический debate video: https://video.example.test/debate.mp4. Выбери Fabric шаблон для разбора заявлений и сделай summary.
evals.expected_output: Recommends a claims/news preset or `analyze_claims` Fabric pattern, asks the Fabric shortlist question with `analyze_claims` first/recommended, and allows manual pattern entry last.
assertions: Selects or recommends a context-appropriate claims/news path.
Includes `analyze_claims` in the Fabric shortlist.
Marks the most context-appropriate Fabric pattern as `(Recommended)`.
Puts manual Fabric pattern entry last.
If Fabric is unavailable, offers current-LLM fallback instead of failing silently.

evals.name: ocr-preset-openai-compatible-secret-redaction
evals.prompt: Для анализа кадров используй ocrPreset `qwen-vl-local` из video-summary-config.json. Там OpenAI-compatible baseUrl и llmApiKey через env:QWEN_KEY. Видео ./slides.mp4.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes the configured llm ocrPreset, resolves env-style API key without printing it, asks/uses frame analysis, and includes OCR/vision results in combined-context.md.
assertions: Accepts `ocrPreset` with `type: llm`, `llmBaseUrl`, `llmApiKey: env:...`, and `llmId`.
Does not print the resolved API key.
Does not save the raw API key in artifacts.
Asks or confirms frame-analysis method before using the OCR preset.
Uses frame outputs as part of `combined-context.md`.

evals.name: manual-settings-last-option
evals.prompt: Сделай summary ./meeting-recording.mp4, но я хочу сам выбрать все настройки вручную: транскрипция, кадры, OCR и prompt.
evals.expected_output: Still runs discovery first, presents preset choices with manual settings last, then walks through manual source, frame analysis, transcription provider, peepshow options, and prompt/Fabric choices.
assertions: Runs discovery before manual settings.
Preset question includes configured presets before manual settings.
The manual settings option is last in the preset question.
Manual flow covers transcript source, transcription provider, frame analysis, and prompt selection.
Does not skip required warnings about transcription/frame download requirements.

evals.name: non-video-near-miss-should-not-proceed
evals.prompt: Суммаризируй README.md в этом репозитории. Это не видео, просто сделай обычный текстовый summary.
evals.expected_output: Does not use video-summary workflow, does not run video discovery, and handles this as a normal text summary or says the video-summary skill is not applicable.
assertions: Does not run `video-summary/scripts/video-summary.mjs discover` on a Markdown file.
Does not ask video preset/source/frame-analysis questions.
Does not invoke peepshow.
Summarizes the Markdown text directly or declines video workflow as not applicable.
